title: Ask Me Anything: CEO & Founder of Crypto_reid
author: Novel_Durian_3522
selftext:
**Hi, I’m Reid and CEO of** Crypto\_reid\*\*.\*\* I’m a ex-TradingView employee & 4+years of trading now building a channel for intraday traders.

We’re an early-stage, but we’ve already made significant progress- our product went live in Dec 2025! Here’s what we offer so far:

1️⃣ Full theory & logic behind every trade taken

2️⃣ Daily BTC & ETH market insights (structure, bias & key levels)

3️⃣ Best Altcoins for Spot Trading (short & mid-term)

4️⃣ Multiple strategies – Scalping, Swings

5️⃣ Weekly Google Meet (minimum once a week) – Live discussion & Q&A - Honestly I would not promise but 1 session would be there per week that I can assure of

6️⃣ Risk management & position sizing guidance

7️⃣ Beginner-friendly + Pro-level insights

I cover crypto

 Crypto\_reid is **free**, and many Signals are available **for free**.

Give it a try, and feel free to ask any questions or share your suggestions for improvements!

Tel- Crypto\_reid

comments.author: Paul_Kuhn
comments.body: Crypto_reid? Never heard. Where can I find more about your company?

comments.author: disaster_story_69
comments.body: do you really think this will get you more people to buy your course?
